project_identity.name: Fintech Glass Dashboard
project_identity.description: A high-end financial command center combining the solidity of Swiss design with the ethereal depth of glassmorphism. It feels like handling physical crystal interfaces.

rules: Use 'Manrope' for all major headings to establish character.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for ALL currency values, stock prices, and crypto addresses.
Headings must be 'tracking-tight' to feel solid.

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-4 md:p-8
bento_grid_rules: Chart Area: col-span-12 md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-8 row-span-2
List Feed: col-span-12 md:col-span-6 lg:col-span-4 row-span-2

cards.classes: rounded-2xl border border-white/20 dark:border-white/10 bg-white/60 dark:bg-gray-900/40 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25 transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 bg-white/10 dark:bg-white/5 border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-md hover:bg-white/20 transition-all active:scale-95

inputs.classes: bg-white/50 dark:bg-black/20 border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 outline-none transition-all backdrop-blur-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-20 lg:w-64 border-r border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-xl z-50 hidden md:flex flex-col
navigation.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 w-full border-t border-border bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl z-50 md:hidden flex justify-around p-4

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay with 2-3% opacity on solid backgrounds to prevent banding.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Do NOT use full-screen gradients. Use 'Orbs' or 'Blobs' of color (Indigo/Purple) that float in the background with 'blur-3xl'.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 'Tracing Beam' effect for active states or high-value cards.
visual_enhancers.rupee_symbol: Display '₹' prominently using the 'Manrope' font weight 700. Do NOT use standard system fonts for currency.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text opacity is at least 90% on glass backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible ring-2 ring-primary focus state.
accessibility.screen_readers: Use aria-labels on icon-only buttons (like the Scanner button).

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'ThemeToggle' immediately that switches 'class="dark"' on the HTML tag.
Use 'react-webcam' for the Scanner Page. Create an overlay with a scanning animation using Framer Motion.
For the 'Markets' page, create a mock real-time ticker if API limits are hit.
The 'Telegram Bot' integration should be a Settings page section where users get a 'Connect' button or a QR code to link their account.
Use 'recharts' for the Income/Expense graphs. Style the grid lines to be barely visible (stroke='#333' opacity={0.1}).
Ensure the 'Rupee' symbol (₹) is used throughout the app for all monetary values.
For 'Glassmorphism', do not just use opacity. Use 'backdrop-blur-md' or 'backdrop-blur-xl' to ensure text legibility.
Paytm Import: Create a drag-and-drop zone that accepts .csv or .pdf files.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
